body.title: CLOSED: cc_queue GH issue routing by repo
body.result: _gh_repo_for() routes by worker/tags; set-github-issue --repo flag; 14 routing tests; commit 4b5a09c5
body.description:
Follow-on to T-migrate-gh-discussions-to-datacenter. cc_queue.py set-github-issue and any auto-creation logic should default to agent_datacenter repo for ADC/CC-workflow tickets and TheIgors for Igor-domain tickets.

Routing rule: if worker=igor OR tags intersect {Cognition, Memory, Habits, Engrams, NarrativeEngine, TWM} → TheIgors repo. Otherwise → agent_datacenter repo.

**Affected files:** TheIgors/lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN — routing logic in cc_queue; update set-github-issue to accept optional --repo flag. OUT — bulk-migrating existing GH issues.
**Test plan:** Unit test: ticket with tags=[Cognition] routes to TheIgors; ticket with tags=[Infrastructure] routes to agent_datacenter.
**Pass condition:** `cc_queue.py set-github-issue --repo agent_datacenter T-swarm-web-tab-ui 596` works; auto-routing test passes.
